title: Changelog Modal + GitHub Actions CI
items: Added /api/changelog endpoint to serve what's-new data from changelog.json
Added changelog modal overlay to star map UI — appears automatically on each new deploy
Modal polls every 5 seconds; compares entry id vs localStorage to detect new deploys
On new entry: game state reloads + modal shown; dismiss persists seen id to localStorage
Dark-themed modal card matches existing space UI (gold title, blue dismiss button)
Added .github/workflows/ci.yml — runs pre-commit + pytest on every push and PR
Broke down M2/M3 epics into 21 atomic sub-issues (#33–#53) with layer labels and DoD
Created 7 layer labels (layer:ui, layer:api, layer:test, etc.) for parallel-safe planning
Wired Blocked-by/Blocks chains in all sub-issue bodies; 17 issues marked blocked
Added all issues to GitHub Project board #1 (48 items total)
